Based on these cues, the framework generates vulnerability-specific attack payloads and embeds them into state-aware request sequences that respect API execution dependencies.To accurately determine whether a vulnerability is successfully triggered, VOAPI2 further incorporates a feedback-driven verification mechanism that analyzes API responses and observable side effects rather than relying solely on generic server error codes. We implement a prototype of VOAPI2 on top of an existing stateful API testing engine and conduct a preliminary evaluation on real-world APIs. The results demonstrate that VOAPI2 is capable of discovering security vulnerabilities that are missed by state-of-the-art API testing tools, including previously unknown security issues that were later confirmed by developers. These findings indicate that vulnerability-oriented testing is a practical and effective direction for improving the coverage and efficiency of RESTful API security testing.
title_zh: VOAPI2：一种面向漏洞的RESTful API测试框架
abstract_zh:
随着Web服务的迅速普及，RESTful API已成为现代软件系统的基本构建模块。随着API越来越多地暴露关键业务逻辑和敏感数据，确保其安全性已成为一项紧迫挑战。然而，现有的大多数RESTful API测试工具主要关注功能正确性和鲁棒性，因此往往无法有效发现那些不会表现为明显崩溃或服务器错误的安全漏洞。

本文提出VOAPI2，一种面向漏洞的RESTful API检测框架，通过利用API功能与漏洞类型之间的内在关联，明确针对安全缺陷进行检测[1]。与传统API模糊测试工具无差别地探索所有端点不同，VOAPI2采用一种引导式测试策略：首先通过分析API规范中的语义线索，识别出安全关键端点；随后基于这些线索生成特定于漏洞的攻击载荷，并将其嵌入到符合API执行依赖关系的状态感知请求序列中。

为了准确判断漏洞是否被成功触发，VOAPI2进一步引入了一种反馈驱动的验证机制，该机制通过分析API响应及可观察的副作用，而非仅依赖通用的服务器错误代码，来判断漏洞状态。我们基于一个现有的有状态API测试引擎实现了VOAPI2的原型，并对真实世界中的API进行了初步评估。结果表明，VOAPI2能够发现当前最先进的API测试工具所遗漏的安全漏洞，包括若干此前未知的安全问题，这些问题后来得到了开发者的确认。

这些发现表明，面向漏洞的测试是一种切实可行且高效的方法，有助于显著提升RESTful API安全测试的覆盖率与效率。

title: Lightweight Yet Powerful: Optimized Tightly Coupled Hyperdimensional Computing Accelerators
authors: Mohsen Asghari, Sebastien Le Beux, Ron Mankarious
publish: 2026 IEEE 17th Latin America Symposium on Circuits and System (LASCAS)
abstract: Hyperdimensional Computing (HDC) is a hardware-friendly machine learning paradigm that encodes data into high-dimensional binary hypervectors, enabling efficient computation through lightweight bitwise operations. Existing HDC accelerators, often implemented on FPGAs, typically rely on custom instruction sets and co-processor designs to optimize performance. However, these architectures face programmability challenges and incur significant control overhead when interacting with the main processor. To overcome these limitations, we present a methodology for designing and optimizing tightly coupled HDC accelerators. The proposed method produces accelerators enhanced with a controller capable of decoding instructions corresponding to key HDC kernels, thereby reducing communication overhead and improving throughput. To validate the approach, we implemented the accelerator at the RTL level and modeled the entire system in SystemVerilog. Experimental results demonstrate that, compared to state-of-the-art architectures, the proposed method reduces software code size by up to 98% while achieving a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$(3 \times$</tex>) speedup.
title_zh: 轻量级且强大：优化的紧密耦合超维度计算加速器
abstract_zh: 超维计算（Hyperdimensional Computing, HDC）是一种硬件友好的机器学习范式，它将数据编码为高维二进制超向量，通过轻量级的位运算实现高效计算。现有的HDC加速器通常在FPGA上实现，依赖于自定义指令集和协处理器设计以优化性能。然而，这些架构在与主处理器交互时面临可编程性挑战，并产生显著的控制开销。为克服这些局限，本文提出了一种设计与优化紧密耦合HDC加速器的方法。所提方法生成的加速器配备了一个控制器，能够解码对应于关键HDC核的指令，从而降低通信开销并提升吞吐量。为验证该方法的有效性，我们在RTL级别实现了加速器，并使用SystemVerilog对整个系统进行了建模。实验结果表明，相较于现有最先进架构，所提方法可将软件代码规模减少高达98%，同时实现3倍的加速比。

title: Design of a PI-Controller ASIC for a Multilevel Converter Using High-Level Synthesis and LibreLane
authors: Francisca Donoso, Nelson Salvador, Christian A. Rojas, Jorge Marín, Gonzalo Carvajal
publish: 2026 IEEE 17th Latin America Symposium on Circuits and System (LASCAS)
abstract: This paper presents the design and validation of a fixed-point PI controller for power electronics applications, introducing a design flow based on high-level synthesis tools. The proposed design methodology tackles the long-standing challenge of migrating high-level floating-point representations of control algorithms into hardware-efficient fixed-point implementations suitable for FPGA prototyping and ASIC integration. A threelevel flying capacitor converter (3L-FCC) serves as the case study to demonstrate the approach. Using software-in-the-loop verification, the fixed-point design is shown to maintain functional equivalence with its floating-point reference. Furthermore, wordlength exploration is conducted to analyze trade-offs between accuracy, area, power consumption and resource utilization. The proposed design flow is validated using both proprietary and opensource high-level synthesis tools to generate RTL descriptions, which are later used for FPGA prototyping and verification and also processed through an open-source ASIC design framework with minor modifications. This flow complements the traditional RTL-to-GDSII flow by reducing HDL development time for designs derived from high-level algorithms.
title_zh: 基于高层次综合与LibreLane的多电平变换器PI控制器ASIC设计
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于电力电子应用的定点PI控制器的设计与验证方法，引入了基于高层次综合工具的设计流程。所提出的 methodology 有效解决了将控制算法的高层浮点表示迁移至硬件高效定点实现这一长期存在的难题，使其适用于FPGA原型设计和ASIC集成。以三电平飞跨电容变换器（3L-FCC）作为案例研究，展示了该方法的有效性。通过软件在环验证，证明了定点设计与其浮点参考模型保持功能等价。此外，还进行了字长探索，分析了精度、面积、功耗及资源利用率之间的权衡关系。该设计流程已通过专有和开源的高层次综合工具进行验证，生成了RTL描述，随后用于FPGA原型设计与验证，并在稍作修改后通过开源ASIC设计框架进行处理。该流程在传统RTL到GDSII流程的基础上，显著缩短了由高层算法衍生设计的HDL开发时间。

title: Context-Aware Enterprise Vulnerability Prioritization and Remediation Recommendations Using Semantic Learning
authors: Sumit Prakash Dubey, Soumya Maity
publish: 2026 5th International Conference on Sentiment Analysis and Deep Learning (ICSADL)
abstract: Enterprise vulnerability management needs prioritization and remediation decisions that need attention beyond generic severity scores and keyword mappings. CVSS frameworks offer standardized severity estimates, but they do not provide the necessary organizational context or understanding of vulnerabilities and remediation details that are available as text. This paper presents a framework for context-aware vulnerability prioritization and remediation recommendations which help organizations prioritize and remediate vulnerability based on its risk it poses to organization and not its technical severity score. It combines semantic learning with risk modeling specific to the organization. This research takes vulnerability descriptions and remediation texts using dense semantic representations from a Sentence-BERT model, allowing for meaning-based retrieval. A machine learning-based risk scoring model includes contextual factors such as asset importance, exposure, and the likelihood of exploitation. Finally, it re-ranks remediation candidates within a unified learning-to-rank framework and provides clear and actionable guidance to cyber analysts for remediation. Experiments on a large enterprise vulnerability dataset show that our approach consistently outperforms lexical, semantic-only, and heuristic riskbased methods regarding Mean Reciprocal Rank and Recall@K, while still keeping query latency low. These results demonstrate the advantages of merging semantic learning with context-aware risk modeling for managing vulnerabilities in enterprises. This paper explicitly incorporates enterprise context into remediation ranking; the proposed framework bridges the gap between vulnerability prioritization and actionable mitigation. In addition, source attribution and decomposed scoring components improve explainability and auditability, supporting practical adoption in enterprise security operations.
title_zh: 基于语义学习的上下文感知企业漏洞优先级排序与修复建议
abstract_zh: 企业漏洞管理需要超越通用严重性评分和关键词映射，做出优先级排序与修复决策。尽管CVSS框架提供了标准化的严重性评估，但其并未提供组织层面的上下文信息，也缺乏对漏洞及其修复细节的深入理解——这些信息往往以文本形式存在。本文提出了一种情境感知的漏洞优先级排序与修复建议框架，帮助组织根据漏洞对自身带来的实际风险进行优先处理，而非仅依据技术严重性评分。该框架结合了语义学习与针对特定组织的风险建模方法。研究利用Sentence-BERT模型生成的密集语义表示，对漏洞描述和修复文本进行基于语义意义的检索。一个基于机器学习的风险评分模型引入了包括资产重要性、暴露程度以及被利用可能性在内的上下文因素。最后，在统一的学习排序（learning-to-rank）框架下重新排序修复候选方案，并为网络安全分析师提供清晰且可操作的修复指导。在大规模企业漏洞数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法在平均倒数排名（Mean Reciprocal Rank）和Recall@K指标上持续优于传统的词法、纯语义及启发式风险驱动方法，同时保持较低的查询延迟。结果证明，将语义学习与情境感知风险建模相结合，对于企业级漏洞管理具有显著优势。本研究明确地将企业上下文融入修复排序过程，所提出的框架弥合了漏洞优先级排序与可执行缓解措施之间的差距。此外，源归属分析与分解评分组件提升了系统的可解释性与可审计性，有助于在企业安全运营中实现实际落地应用。

title: Empowering Educators Through AI-Assisted Code Generation for Life Skills Education
authors: Patchara Eamcharoen
publish: 2025 7th International Conference on Modern Educational Technology (ICMET)
abstract: This study investigates how AI-assisted code generation can empower educators to rapidly design learning activities without programming expertise. Using ChatGPT, a webbased application was developed and deployed on WordPress to promote life skills awareness through scenario-based quizzes across adolescence, adulthood, and older age. The learning activity encouraged students to reflect on health-related choices and behaviors influencing longevity. Moreover, analysis of student reflections revealed meaningful engagement and reflective learning in life skills-particularly in raising awareness of healthy decision-making, strengthening problem-solving perspectives, and fostering personal responsibility for well-being. The quality of life skills content and the effectiveness of its delivery contributed to high overall student satisfaction. Student feedback indicated strong engagement, usability, and positive learning experiences with the web-based activity. The findings demonstrate that AIassisted code generation can democratize educational innovation, enabling educators to create meaningful, technology-enhanced learning experiences that strengthen life skills for lifelong wellbeing.
title_zh: 通过人工智能辅助代码生成赋能教育工作者开展生活技能教育
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了人工智能辅助代码生成如何赋能教育工作者在无需编程技能的情况下快速设计学习活动。通过使用ChatGPT，开发并部署了一个基于网页的应用程序，该程序嵌入WordPress平台，旨在通过情境化测验促进青少年、成年期及老年阶段的生活技能意识。该学习活动鼓励学生反思影响寿命的健康相关选择与行为。此外，对学生反思内容的分析显示，学生在生活技能方面表现出深刻的参与度和反思性学习，尤其体现在提升对健康决策的认识、强化问题解决视角以及培养对自身福祉的责任感。生活技能内容的质量及其有效传递显著提升了学生的整体满意度。学生反馈表明，该网络学习活动具有高度的参与性、易用性以及积极的学习体验。研究结果表明，人工智能辅助代码生成能够推动教育创新的普及化，使教育工作者能够创建有意义且技术增强的学习体验，从而持续提升个体的生活技能与终身福祉。

title: AutoSDLC-LC: A Low-Code AI-Driven Framework for Accelerating and Democratizing the Software Development Lifecycle
authors: C Jayamala, Ajathyan N E, Dharanya A G, Lakshitha Viswanathan, Vishnu Priya S, Anees Nachiya K
publish: 2025 International Conference On Emerging Computation and Information Technologies (ICECIT)
abstract: The increasing demand for rapid software development, especially from non-technical stakeholders, has highlighted the need for intelligent automation within the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC). In this paper, we present AutoSDLC-LC a new low-code, AI-driven, paradigm-shifting software development framework that is radically changing software engineering through its ability to speed up application development with high precision and democratization. Combining the transformer-based Natural Language Processing (T5) to convert a set of requirements into a model, the AutoML to generate the backend model, and the OpenAI Codex to dynamically generate the code, the framework enables users to develop, run, and deploy full-stack applications with little manual programming. AutoSDLC-LC has a drag and drop workflow designer, smart schema-to-component map following meta-learning, and GPT as an aid in test case generation. The framework has a demonstrated 72.6% average time savings on development in ten varied case studies, which spanned inventory management to sales analytics, reached an average code coverage of 90.2%, and an AutoML model accuracy of 94.2%. Also, API binding precision was at 93.8% and defect density at 1.43 KLOC. Such head-to-toe combination serves more than just larger time-to-market by enabling citizen developers and business users to take part in an end-to-end delivery of software. Through the utilization of the low-code accessibility and AI-based intelligence, AutoSDLC-LC virtually eliminates the remains between conceptualization and actualization, leading to an evolutionary solution which is applicable in the current agile space. The results provided confirm its feasible usefulness in easing the effort, upsurge automation and sustaining quality software. The future extensions will be aimed at better explainability, adding natural language debugging, and incorporating federated deployment mechanisms.
title_zh: AutoSDLC-LC：一种低代码的AI驱动框架，用于加速并普及软件开发生命周期
abstract_zh: 日益增长的快速软件开发需求，尤其是来自非技术利益相关者的需求，凸显了在软件开发生命周期（SDLC）中引入智能自动化的重要性。本文提出了一种名为AutoSDLC-LC的新一代低代码、AI驱动的范式变革型软件开发框架，该框架通过其高精度与普及化能力，正在彻底改变软件工程的面貌，显著加速应用开发进程。AutoSDLC-LC融合了基于Transformer的自然语言处理技术（T5），将一组需求转化为模型；利用AutoML生成后端模型；并借助OpenAI Codex动态生成代码，使用户能够以极少的手动编程完成全栈应用的开发、运行与部署。该框架配备拖拽式工作流设计器，采用元学习实现的智能模式到组件映射，并以GPT辅助测试用例生成。在涵盖库存管理到销售分析等十个不同场景的案例研究中，AutoSDLC-LC平均节省开发时间72.6%，代码覆盖率平均达90.2%，AutoML模型准确率达到94.2%；API绑定精度为93.8%，缺陷密度为每千行代码1.43个。这种端到端的集成不仅大幅缩短了上市时间，更使公民开发者和业务用户能够全程参与软件交付。通过低代码可访问性与基于AI的智能能力，AutoSDLC-LC几乎消除了从概念构想到实际实现之间的鸿沟，形成一种适用于当前敏捷环境的演进式解决方案。实验结果证实，该框架在降低开发负担、提升自动化水平以及保障软件质量方面具有切实可行的价值。未来扩展方向将聚焦于增强可解释性、引入自然语言调试功能，并集成联邦部署机制。

title: Source Code Vulnerability Detection Technology Based on Code Semantic Contribution
authors: Chunling Liu, Yonghe Tang, Jian Lin, Le Liu
publish: 2026 International Conference on Communication Networks and Machine Learning (CNML)
abstract: This research is dedicated to developing source code vulnerability detection technology based on code semantic contribution to address software security challenges. The research preprocesses source code functions by constructing a dictionary library of common programming naming conventions, builds data dependency graphs and control dependency graphs using the Joern tool, adopts BPE word segmentation technology, and combines sentence embedding variants and LSTM graph embedding for semantic feature extraction and embedding to achieve precise detection. The construction of the experimental environment takes into account both hardware performance and software compatibility. The Big-Vul, SARD and NVD datasets were selected and used for the experiment after cleaning and stratified sampling processing. Compared with methods such as Checkmarx, SySeVR based on BLSTM, VulCNN based on CNN, Devign based on graph neural networks, and LineVul based on Transformer, the results show that: The semantic contribution method of this study performed outstandingly in the comprehensive performance indicators, with a recall rate of 87.52%, an accuracy rate of 90.13%, a precision rate of 88.76%, and an F1 value of 0.881. It shows obvious advantages under different types of vulnerability detection, different code scales and training data volumes, and has lower false positive and false negative rates. This technology provides a more effective way for source code vulnerability detection and is expected to enhance the overall security of the software.
title_zh: 基于代码语义贡献的源代码漏洞检测技术
abstract_zh: 本研究致力于开发基于代码语义贡献的源代码漏洞检测技术，以应对软件安全挑战。研究通过构建常见编程命名规范的词典库对源代码函数进行预处理，利用Joern工具构建数据依赖图和控制依赖图，采用BPE词分段技术，并结合句子嵌入变体与LSTM图嵌入方法进行语义特征提取与嵌入，从而实现精准检测。实验环境的搭建兼顾了硬件性能与软件兼容性。经过清洗及分层采样处理后，选用Big-Vul、SARD和NVD数据集开展实验。与Checkmarx、基于BLSTM的SySeVR、基于CNN的VulCNN、基于图神经网络的Devign以及基于Transformer的LineVul等方法相比，本研究提出的语义贡献方法在综合性能指标上表现突出，召回率为87.52%，准确率为90.13%，精确率为88.76%，F1值达0.881。该方法在不同类型的漏洞检测、不同代码规模及不同训练数据量下均展现出明显优势，且误报率和漏报率较低。该技术为源代码漏洞检测提供了更高效的方法，有望显著提升软件整体安全性。

title: Toward the Conduction of Automated Systematic Literature Reviews: The Role of Large Language Models
authors: Marco Fiore
publish: 2025 9th International Conference on Computer, Software and Modeling (ICCSM)
abstract: The conduction of Systematic Literature Reviews is an essential yet labor-intensive process for researchers, requiring meticulous compilation and analysis of literature to answer predefined Research Questions. Despite attempts to streamline this process, automation of reviews remains a significant challenge. This paper explores the potential of Generative AI and Large Language Models to revolutionize the review process by automating key tasks such as identifying, extracting, and synthesizing relevant literature. By leveraging open-source Large Language Models, we aim to reduce the time and effort traditionally required for comprehensive literature reviews. Our study involves comparing various models, including lightweight and more robust ones. We replicate a published review on Blockchain technology in agri-food traceability to evaluate the performance of these models. Results indicate that while high-parameter models successfully generate relevant search strings and classifications, they also exhibit trade-offs in terms of response times. Our findings highlight both the promise and limitations of current Large Language Models in automating Systematic Literature Reviews.
title_zh: 面向自动化系统文献综述的开展：大语言模型的作用
abstract_zh: 系统性文献综述的开展对研究人员而言是一项至关重要但又耗时费力的工作，需要仔细地收集和分析文献以回答预先设定的研究问题。尽管已有尝试优化这一过程，但实现综述的自动化仍面临重大挑战。本文探讨了生成式人工智能与大型语言模型在革新综述流程方面的潜力，通过自动化识别、提取和综合相关文献等关键任务，提升效率。我们利用开源大型语言模型，旨在减少传统上完成全面文献综述所需的时间与精力。本研究对比了多种模型，涵盖轻量级与更强大的模型。为评估这些模型的表现，我们复现了一篇关于区块链技术在农业食品可追溯性中应用的已发表综述。结果表明，虽然高参数模型能够成功生成相关的检索关键词和分类，但在响应速度方面存在权衡。我们的研究揭示了当前大型语言模型在自动化系统性文献综述中的巨大潜力及其局限性。

title: The Dual Role of Artificial Intelligence and LLM in Cybersecurity
authors: Leandros Maglaras, Vassilis C. Gerogiannis, Mohamed Amine Ferrag, Alexios Lekidis, Abderrahmane Lakas, Naghmeh Moradpoor
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence Security and Governance (ICAISG)
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming the cybersecurity landscape, taking a dual role as both enablers of defense. This paper explores this duality by distinguishing between AI for Security, where intelligent models enhance threat analysis, intrusion detection, and automated mitigation, and Security for AI, which focuses on securing models themselves against adversarial manipulation, data leakage, and prompt-based exploitation. To empirically evaluate the capabilities of modern LLMs in cybersecurity, we conducted extensive experiments using the newly developed CyberMetric dataset, which assesses cybersecurity knowledge across multiple domains such as cryptography, network defense, and software vulnerabilities. Our evaluation of twenty state-of-the-art LLMs—including GPT-5 Chat, Grok 4 Fast, Qwen3 235B, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and DeepSeek V3.2—demonstrates that the 2025 generation of models achieves near-human performance, with GPT-5 Chat reaching 98.75% accuracy and several open-source models performing within a 2-3% margin. These results highlight the growing maturity of open LLM ecosystems for cybersecurity applications and confirm that modern LLMs are becoming reliable instruments for cyber defense, capable of supporting automated threat analysis, vulnerability assessment, and compliance verification, while also emphasizing the need to ensure their safety, transparency, and resilience against misuse.
title_zh: 人工智能与大语言模型在网络安全中的双重角色
abstract_zh:
人工智能（AI）与大型语言模型（LLMs）正在重塑网络安全领域，扮演着防御能力的双重角色。本文通过区分“用于安全的人工智能”（AI for Security）与“为人工智能提供安全”（Security for AI），深入探讨这一双重性。前者指利用智能模型提升威胁分析、入侵检测和自动化响应的能力；后者则聚焦于防范对抗性攻击、数据泄露以及基于提示词的滥用等对模型本身的威胁。

为实证评估现代大型语言模型在网络安全领域的表现，我们基于新开发的 CyberMetric 数据集开展了广泛实验。该数据集涵盖密码学、网络防护、软件漏洞等多个网络安全领域，全面评估模型的知识掌握程度。我们对二十个最先进的大模型进行了测试，包括 GPT-5 Chat、Grok 4 Fast、Qwen3 235B、Gemini 2.5 Flash 和 DeepSeek V3.2 等。结果显示，2025 年代的模型已接近人类水平的表现：GPT-5 Chat 达到 98.75% 的准确率，多个开源模型亦仅落后 2-3%。这些成果凸显了开源大模型生态系统在网络安全应用中的日益成熟，证实现代大语言模型正逐步成为可靠的网络安全工具，能够有效支持自动化威胁分析、漏洞评估与合规性验证。同时，也进一步强调了确保其安全性、透明性及抗滥用能力的重要性。

title: Semi-Supervised Learning and Blockchain Integration for Transparent Smart Contract Security
authors: Muhammad Sannan Khaliq, Love Allen Chijioke Ahakonye, Jae Min Lee, Dong-Seong Kim
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Information and Communication (ICAIIC)
abstract: With the rapid proliferation of blockchain technology and smart contracts in consumer IoT systems, ensuring digital trust and security remains a persistent challenge due to vulnerability diversity, data scarcity, and limited on-chain auditability. To address these issues, this paper presents PureChain, a scalable trust framework that integrates semi-supervised deep learning for smart contract vulnerability detection with blockchain-based audit logging for transparent security assurance. The framework employs a lightweight Conv1D neural architecture trained via iterative pseudo-labeling and a Mean Teacher strategy, effectively leveraging tens of thousands of unlabeled contracts to minimize annotation requirements. Experimental evaluation shows that PureChain achieves macro F1-scores exceeding 99% and significant improvements in recall for rare vulnerabilities, outperforming both supervised and state-of-the-art baselines. The integration of blockchain ensures all detection events are immutably recorded, enabling accountable and verifiable device operation. These results demonstrate that adaptive semi-supervised learning, combined with on-chain transparency, provides a robust and efficient foundation for secure smart contract monitoring across IoT and edge environments, with future work targeting more adaptive pseudo-labeling, semi supervised learning (SSL) techniques and cross-chain generalization.
title_zh: 半监督学习与区块链集成实现透明的智能合约安全
abstract_zh: 随着区块链技术和智能合约在消费物联网系统中的迅速普及，由于漏洞类型多样、数据稀缺以及链上可审计性有限，确保数字信任与安全仍面临持续挑战。为应对这些问题，本文提出PureChain——一种可扩展的信任框架，该框架将半监督深度学习用于智能合约漏洞检测，并结合基于区块链的审计日志记录，实现透明化的安全保障。该框架采用轻量级Conv1D神经网络架构，通过迭代伪标签法与均值教师（Mean Teacher）策略进行训练，有效利用数以万计的未标注合约，显著降低人工标注需求。实验评估表明，PureChain在宏平均F1分数上超过99%，对罕见漏洞的召回率也得到显著提升，优于传统监督学习及当前最先进的基线方法。区块链的集成确保所有检测事件被不可篡改地记录，从而实现设备操作的可问责性和可验证性。结果表明，自适应半监督学习结合链上透明性，为物联网和边缘环境中的智能合约安全监控提供了稳健且高效的解决方案。未来工作将聚焦于更自适应的伪标签机制、先进的半监督学习（SSL）技术以及跨链泛化能力的提升。

title: Static Code Vulnerability Detection Framework for Secure Compiler Assisted Software Development Pipelines
authors: Arivazhagan P, Sunitha. P, M. Sakthivanitha, M. Vijaya Maheswari, S.K. Ramani, T. Thirumalaikumari
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: With the growing use of software systems in critical areas, securing the code while it is being developed has become a top priority. Traditional manual code reviews and testing can't often find subtler vulnerabilities for a significant security potential risk. This study fills the gaps of automated and accurate detection of static code vulnerabilities in secure compiler-aided software development pipelines. The goal is to have a strong structure that combines the static code analysis, the anomaly detection using machine learning, and the compiler-based instrumentation in order to detect potential vulnerabilities early in the development. The proposed framework uses the combinations of hybrid techniques of pattern-based vulnerability scanning, control-flow and data-flow analysis, and reinforcement learning models for prioritizing critical issues. Experiments were performed on commonly used benchmark datasets, such as the Juliet Test Suite, among several programming languages, and the detection accuracy of 96.3%, precision of 94.8%, recall of 95.1%, and F1-score of 94.9% were obtained, which were <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$8 - 12 \%$</tex> better than existing static analysis tools on all metrics. The results show the effectiveness of making compiler-level insights work along with machine learning models in proactive vulnerability detection. Conclusively it does not only improve the security posture of software development pipeline but also lowers the overhead of remediation of vulnerability post deployment which is a practical solution for secure software engineering.
title_zh: 用于安全编译器辅助软件开发流程的静态代码漏洞检测框架
abstract_zh:
随着软件系统在关键领域中的应用日益广泛，开发过程中的代码安全已成为首要任务。传统的手动代码审查和测试往往难以发现那些潜在威胁较大的隐蔽漏洞，存在显著的安全风险。本研究填补了在安全编译器辅助的软件开发流程中，对静态代码漏洞进行自动化且高精度检测的空白。其目标是构建一个强大而综合的体系结构，将静态代码分析、基于机器学习的异常检测以及编译器级代码插桩技术相结合，从而在开发早期阶段及时识别潜在漏洞。

所提出的框架融合了多种混合技术，包括基于模式的漏洞扫描、控制流与数据流分析，以及强化学习模型以优先处理关键问题。实验在多个常用基准数据集（如Juliet测试套件）上，针对多种编程语言进行了验证，取得了96.3%的检测准确率、94.8%的精确率、95.1%的召回率以及94.9%的F1分数，各项指标均比现有静态分析工具提升了8%至12%。结果表明，将编译器层面的洞察力与机器学习模型相结合，在主动式漏洞检测方面具有显著有效性。

综上所述，该方法不仅显著提升了软件开发流程的整体安全水平，还大幅降低了漏洞在部署后修复所需的成本与开销，为实现安全软件工程提供了一种切实可行的解决方案。

title: The Virtue of Hallucination: When AI Mistakes Make Software Safer
authors: Antonio Mastropaolo
abstract: “LLMorpheus: Mutation Testing Using Large Language Models,” published in IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering in 2025, proposes a large language model-driven mutation testing framework that moves beyond fixed operator catalogs by using context-aware code infilling.
title_zh: 幻觉的美德：当AI出错反而让软件更安全
abstract_zh: 《LLMorpheus：利用大型语言模型进行变异测试》，发表于2025年IEEE软件工程汇刊，提出了一种基于大型语言模型的变异测试框架，该框架突破了传统固定变异算子库的局限，采用上下文感知的代码补全技术。

title: Investigating Violations of Coding Standards in Large Language Models
authors: YongBeom Park, HoYong Lim, Jian Kim, Ki-Il Kim
abstract: Automated code review using Large Language Models (LLM) has attracted many researchers’ interests by detecting suspicious codes. However, its another application for ensuring compliance with specific coding standard such as MISRA-C remains unexplored yet. Even though static code analyzers usually are employed for this purpose, they are often too slow to adapt standard revisions and struggle with company-specific rules. To address these limitations, we propose a new LLM framework to investigate violation of coding standard, called LLM-CS to leverage LLMs as a more flexible alternative. The proposed framework consists of two modules, that is, Identifier and Specification module. The former adapts fine-tuned Positive and Unlabeled (PU) learning to filter suspicious methods from source code while the latter is to specify the exact coding rules violated in the suspicious methods identified by the Identifier. Our study uses the PEP8 standard to validate the framework by considering extension to other coding standards as well. By experimental results, LLM-CS demonstrated valid detection and specification of violation for low external dependency.
title_zh: 大型语言模型中编码规范违规行为的调查
abstract_zh: 使用大型语言模型（LLM）进行自动化代码审查已引起众多研究人员的关注，主要在于其能够检测可疑代码。然而，其在确保代码符合特定编码标准（如MISRA-C）方面的应用仍鲜有探索。尽管静态代码分析工具通常被用于此目的，但它们往往因难以快速适应标准更新，且在处理公司特定规则时存在困难。为解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新的基于LLM的框架——LLM-CS，旨在利用LLM作为更具灵活性的替代方案，以识别编码标准违规行为。该框架包含两个模块：标识模块（Identifier）和规范模块（Specification）。前者采用微调后的正例-未标记（Positive and Unlabeled, PU）学习方法，从源代码中筛选出可疑函数；后者则用于精确指定由标识模块识别出的可疑函数所违反的具体编码规则。本研究以PEP8标准验证该框架的有效性，并考虑未来扩展至其他编码标准的可能性。实验结果表明，LLM-CS在外部依赖较低的情况下，能够有效检测并准确描述编码违规行为。

title: A Multi-Modal Fusion Approach for Cybersecurity Threat Detection Using the FIT-BERT Model
authors: Sravya Erukulla, Sai Suhas Kandukoori, Pothana Dheeraj Roy Dwivedhi, Basetty Mallikarjuna
publish: 2025 International Conference on Data, Energy and Communication Networks (DECoN)
abstract: Traditional machine learning-based models for detecting cybersecurity threats cannot derive the semantic relations among network traffic and, therefore, have limited precision in sophisticated attacks. This paper introduces the FIT-BERT model. It is a dual-stream fusion architecture for high-precision network intrusion detection. The statistical approach creates a Feature-Interaction Transformer which analyzes numerical flow features in order to identify complex interdependencies in the traffic data. In parallel to that, the semantic flow depends on a pre trained language model DistilBERT for processing autogenerated textual descriptions of the network flow, capturing important contextual insights from the traffic. These numerical and semantic insights are then combined into a single feature vector for final classification. This multimodal method results in significant improvements in the identification of specific, critical threats and attacks. Trained using a complicated Focal Loss function for addressing severe class imbalance, the FIT-BERT model shows a specialized capability for high precision threat detection and has significant capability to help with alert fatigue in highly advanced Security Operations Centers.
title_zh: 基于FIT-BERT模型的多模态融合网络安全威胁检测方法
abstract_zh: 基于传统机器学习的网络安全威胁检测模型无法提取网络流量之间的语义关系，因此在应对复杂攻击时精度有限。本文提出了一种FIT-BERT模型，该模型采用双流融合架构，实现高精度的网络入侵检测。其中，统计方法构建了特征交互Transformer（Feature-Interaction Transformer），用于分析数值型流量特征，以识别流量数据中复杂的相互依赖关系；与此同时，语义流则利用预训练的语言模型DistilBERT，对自动生成的网络流量文本描述进行处理，从而捕捉流量中的重要上下文信息。随后，将数值特征与语义特征融合为单一特征向量，用于最终分类。这种多模态方法显著提升了对特定关键威胁和攻击的识别能力。通过采用复杂的焦点损失函数（Focal Loss）进行训练，有效缓解了类别严重不平衡问题，使FIT-BERT模型在高精度威胁检测方面展现出独特优势，并能显著缓解高级安全运营中心中的告警疲劳问题。

title: Smarter Silicon: AI-Driven Power, Clock, and Floor planning for Sub-5nm and 3D SoCs
authors: Phaneendra Chainulu Sri Adibhatla, Srikanth Aitha, Uday Ashokbhai Korat
publish: 2025 International Conference on Emerging Technologies and Innovation for Sustainability (EmergIN)
abstract: The inevitable reduction to semiconductor technology to less than 5nm nodes presents extremely challenging issues to power management, clock distribution and floor planning of 3D System-on-Chip (SOC) architectures. The traditional Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools do not perform very well in the optimization of the multi-dimensional design space which is enormous. In this empirical study, an optimization system has been proposed using DL wherein convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and reinforcement learning (RL) are applied to automatism and optimize power, clock, and floor planning plans. Thermal hotspots, clock tree synthesis optimization, and interconnect delays minimization is predicted by the proposed model using datasets obtained according to the industry-level design benchmarks. The experimental results indicate up to 27 percent power savings, 19 percent clock skew or 22 percent increase in area usage, compared to first-generation heuristic-based EDA tools. The outcomes generate a novel paradigm based on which the employment of AI-boosted design intelligence will reduce physical design closure dramatically and give it reliability in the context of ultra-scaled semiconductor technologies.
title_zh: 更智能的硅片：面向5纳米以下及3D SoC的AI驱动电源、时钟与布局规划
abstract_zh: 随着半导体技术不可避免地发展至5纳米以下节点，三维系统级芯片（3D SoC）架构在功耗管理、时钟分配和布局规划方面面临极其严峻的挑战。传统的电子设计自动化（EDA）工具在处理庞大且多维的设计空间优化时表现不佳。在本项实证研究中，提出了一种基于深度学习（DL）的优化系统，采用卷积神经网络（CNN）与强化学习（RL）技术，实现对功耗、时钟及布局规划方案的自动化与优化。该模型利用行业级设计基准所获取的数据集，能够预测热热点、时钟树综合优化以及互连延迟最小化等关键问题。实验结果表明，相较于第一代基于启发式算法的EDA工具，本方法可实现最高达27%的功耗降低，时钟偏移减少19%，或在面积使用率增加22%的情况下达成更优性能。研究成果建立了一种新范式，表明人工智能驱动的设计智能将显著缩短物理设计收敛时间，并在超微缩半导体技术背景下大幅提升设计可靠性。

title: Ψ-xLSTM: Automated Behavioral Verilog-A Generation from Distilled Physics-Informed xLSTM Networks for High-Frequency Device Modeling
authors: Sorin Liviu Jurj
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have emerged as a powerful tool for device modeling, yet they suffer from a fundamental spectral bias, often failing to capture high-frequency transient dynamics essential for modern circuit simulation. While recent implementations of Extended Long Short-Term Memory (xLSTM) networks have successfully mitigated this bias by leveraging exponential gating and matrix memories, they introduce prohibitive computational complexity O(N2) that renders them unsuitable for standard compact modeling and hardware deployment. In this work, we introduce Ψ-xLSTM, a framework that extends the Ψ-HDL methodology to recurrent architectures, enabling the automatic generation of efficient behavioral Verilog-A models that retain the high-frequency fidelity of xLSTMs. We propose a novel Recurrent Relation-Aware Distillation (RRAD) strategy that preserves temporal dynamics and targets the specific architectural innovations of xLSTM. First, we demonstrate that the xLSTM exponential gating mechanisms can be clustered to reveal discrete, physically interpretable time constants (relaxation times), replacing continuous gate values with sparse, physics-based parameters. Second, we apply structural compression to the xLSTM matrix memory (mLSTM), proving that the governing physics of device dynamics resides in a low-rank subspace, allowing the dense matrix to be collapsed into a few dominant eigen-modes. We validate Ψ-xLSTM on high-frequency transient memristor dynamics, where the framework achieves the spectral accuracy of full xLSTM-PINNs while reducing parameter count by up to 84%. Extended evaluation across additional spectral-bias baselines, multiple device classes, small-signal and large-signal active-device benchmarks, and publicly available experimental datasets further demonstrates the robustness and broader applicability of the approach. SPICE circuit simulation validates the complete model generation pipeline with a mean absolute error of 0.40 mA, confirming quantitative accuracy. The resulting models are automatically exported as compact behavioral Verilog-A code that captures high-frequency harmonics missed by standard PINNs, while simulating 7.6× faster in Python, with substantial additional gains expected in compiled SPICE due to elimination of matrix-memory overhead, supported by complexity analysis and behavioral simulation validation.
title_zh: Ψ-xLSTM：从提炼的物理信息驱动的xLSTM网络自动生成高频器件建模用行为级Verilog-A代码
abstract_zh: 物理信息神经网络（PINNs）已成为器件建模的强大工具，但其存在固有的谱偏差问题，往往无法捕捉现代电路仿真中至关重要的高频瞬态动态。尽管近期采用扩展长短期记忆（xLSTM）网络的实现通过引入指数门控机制和矩阵记忆，在一定程度上缓解了这一偏差，却带来了高达 $ O(N^2) $ 的计算复杂度，使其难以应用于标准紧凑建模及硬件部署。本文提出 Ψ-xLSTM 框架，将 Ψ-HDL 方法学拓展至递归架构，实现了高效行为级 Verilog-A 模型的自动生成，同时保留了 xLSTM 的高频保真度。我们提出一种新型的**递归关系感知蒸馏**（Recurrent Relation-Aware Distillation, RRAD）策略，以精准保留时间动态，并针对 xLSTM 的特定结构创新进行优化。首先，我们证明 xLSTM 中的指数门控机制可通过聚类揭示出离散且具有物理解释意义的时间常数（弛豫时间），从而用稀疏的、基于物理的参数替代连续的门控值；其次，我们对 xLSTM 的矩阵记忆（mLSTM）实施结构压缩，证明器件动态的 governing 物理规律存在于低秩子空间中，使得稠密矩阵可被压缩为少数主导特征模态。我们在高频瞬态忆阻器动态上验证了 Ψ-xLSTM 框架，结果表明该方法在保持全尺寸 xLSTM-PINN 谱精度的同时，参数量减少高达 84%。在更多谱偏差基线、多种器件类型、小信号与大信号有源器件基准测试以及公开可用的实验数据集上的扩展评估，进一步验证了该方法的鲁棒性与广泛适用性。SPICE 电路仿真验证了完整的模型生成流程，平均绝对误差仅为 0.40 mA，证实了其定量准确性。所生成的模型可自动导出为紧凑的行为级 Verilog-A 代码，能够捕捉传统 PINNs 所遗漏的高频谐波成分；在 Python 中仿真速度提升 7.6 倍，且由于消除了矩阵记忆开销，在编译后的 SPICE 环境中预计还将获得更显著的性能增益，相关结论得到了复杂度分析与行为仿真验证的支持。

title: Agentic AI in Network Slicing
authors: Anshul Anilkumar Mundakatil, Anjan Phani Raj Narla, Akshil Anilkumar Mundakatil, Sai Srinivas Muriki, Ahmed Hambaba
publish: 2025 9th International Conference on Computer, Software and Modeling (ICCSM)
abstract: Network slicing has emerged as a pivotal innovation in modern telecommunications, enabling the creation of tailored virtual networks within shared physical infrastructures. By dynamically allocating resources to meet the unique demands of various applications, network slicing fosters both flexibility and efficiency. However, traditional methods for slice orchestration and resource allocation struggle with the complexity of multi-domain environments and rapidly evolving service requirements. To address these challenges, we propose a novel framework leveraging Large Language Models and multi-agent systems for automated slice management within Open Radio Access Network architectures. The system translates user intent into precise technical requirements through LLMs, ensuring seamless alignment between application needs and O-RAN configurations. These requirements are deployed in an Open RAN environment, where real-time performance monitoring and adaptive resource management occur through collaborative learning, enabling continuous system improvement by sharing insights between different components. Our approach incorporates Graph RAG for slice prediction, enhancing the system's ability to model complex relationships and dependencies within the network. We also present a standardscompliant O-RAN testing environment to validate the system's effectiveness in addressing the complexities of modern network slicing. This work underscores the transformative potential of combining LLMs with multi-agent systems to redefine resource allocation and orchestration in next-generation networks.
title_zh: 智能代理AI在网络切片中的应用
abstract_zh: 网络切片已成为现代电信领域的一项关键创新，能够在共享的物理基础设施上创建量身定制的虚拟网络。通过动态分配资源以满足各类应用的独特需求，网络切片既提升了灵活性，又增强了效率。然而，传统的切片编排与资源分配方法在应对多域环境的复杂性以及快速变化的服务需求方面面临挑战。为解决这些问题，我们提出一种新型框架，该框架结合大型语言模型（LLM）与多智能体系统，实现开放无线接入网（Open RAN）架构下的自动化切片管理。系统利用大语言模型将用户意图转化为精确的技术需求，确保应用需求与O-RAN配置之间的无缝对接。这些需求被部署于开放RAN环境中，通过协同学习实现实时性能监控与自适应资源管理，使不同组件间能够共享洞察，持续优化系统性能。我们的方法引入图结构检索增强生成（Graph RAG）技术进行切片预测，显著提升了系统对网络内部复杂关系与依赖性的建模能力。此外，我们还构建了一个符合标准的O-RAN测试环境，用以验证该系统在应对现代网络切片复杂性方面的有效性。本研究凸显了将大型语言模型与多智能体系统相结合，在下一代网络中重新定义资源分配与编排机制的巨大潜力。

title: A Short Review of Buffer Overflow Attack and its Prevention
authors: Ahmed Faraz
publish: 2025 15th International Conference on Mathematics, Actuarial Science, Computer Science and Statistics (MACS)
abstract: The unallocated random access memory locations provides loop holes to gain the access control of the system to the attacker. This loop hole in the software of computer system provides a big vulnerability to the attacker who gains the access of the system by exploiting Buffer Overflow Vulnerability. The Buffer Overflow attack is hybrid in nature, both the hardware and software are compromised by the attacker by gaining the access control of the system. As Internet of Things technology has been evolved and computer communication networks are more linked with it, the Buffer Overflow attack has become more security concern. In all the types of Buffer Overflow attack launched on the machines, the operating system level control is gained by the attacker which can harm the security of all the machines and devices connected to the compromised machines through Internet of Things. Securing Stack Pointer, Program Counter, Processor Status Word registers in safe locations in memory at the hardware level can prevent Buffer Overflow attack.
title_zh: 缓冲区溢出攻击及其防范的简要评述
abstract_zh: 未分配的随机访问内存位置为攻击者获取系统访问控制权提供了漏洞。这一软件层面的漏洞，使得通过利用缓冲区溢出漏洞获得系统访问权限的攻击者面临巨大的安全威胁。缓冲区溢出攻击具有混合性质，攻击者在获得系统控制权后，既可破坏硬件，也可破坏软件。随着物联网技术的发展，计算机通信网络与物联网的联系日益紧密，缓冲区溢出攻击已成为更加严峻的安全隐患。在针对各类机器发起的缓冲区溢出攻击中，攻击者通常会获取操作系统级别的控制权，从而对通过物联网连接到受控机器的所有设备和系统造成安全威胁。在硬件层面，将栈指针、程序计数器和处理器状态字寄存器安全地存储于内存中的指定位置，可以有效防止缓冲区溢出攻击的发生。

title: Automated PI Parameter Optimization for LLRF Systems: A Comparative Study of LLM-guided parameter tuning and Bayesian Optimization Approaches
authors: Lijuan Yang, Yilin Miao, Shihui Wei, Zhenglong Zhu, Zhen Gao, Zhaojie Chen, Qizhen Hou, Jiayi Peng, Jinying Ma, Chengye Xu, Xinghao Ding, Guirong Huang, Liepeng Sun, Rihua Zeng, Zhijun Wang, Feng Qiu, Yuan He
abstract: This paper presents a comparative study of LLM-guided parameter tuning and Bayesian Optimization (BO) for automated PI parameter adjustment in Low Level Radio Frequency (LLRF) systems. Both methods demonstrate effective performance across continuous wave and pulsed operation modes, addressing the challenges of traditional manual tuning in superconducting accelerator facilities. Multi-cavity validation experiments were conducted on both operation modes. For continuous wave 2-parameter optimization, both methods converge to optimal regions within 15 iterations. For pulsed 6-parameter optimization involving coupled amplitude-phase control loops, both methods achieve satisfactory results in around 20 iterations, meeting stability requirements for beam operation. Comparative analysis reveals distinct application advantages: BO is better suited for large-scale batch optimization scenarios, particularly excelling in multi-cavity parallel commissioning and high-dimensional parameter space exploration due to its systematic probabilistic framework. The LLM-guided approach is more appropriate for online optimization scenarios with strict operational constraints, where its conservative optimization strategy and traceable reasoning process make it ideal for parameter fine-tuning during operations. The study provides practical method selection guidelines for intelligent operation of large-scale accelerator facilities.
title_zh: LLRF系统中PI参数的自动化优化：基于大语言模型引导的参数调优与贝叶斯优化方法的对比研究
abstract_zh: 本文对基于大语言模型（LLM）引导的参数调优与贝叶斯优化（BO）在低能射频（LLRF）系统中自动PI参数调节的应用进行了对比研究。两种方法在连续波和脉冲运行模式下均表现出良好的性能，有效解决了超导加速器装置中传统人工调参所面临的挑战。针对两种运行模式，开展了多腔体验证实验。在连续波模式下的两参数优化中，两种方法均在15次迭代内收敛至最优区域；在涉及耦合幅度-相位控制回路的脉冲模式六参数优化中，两种方法均在约20次迭代内取得满意结果，满足束流运行的稳定性要求。对比分析表明，二者具有不同的应用优势：贝叶斯优化更适合大规模批量优化场景，尤其在多腔体并行调试及高维参数空间探索方面表现突出，得益于其系统化的概率建模框架；而基于LLM的方法更适用于具有严格运行约束的在线优化场景，其保守的优化策略和可追溯的推理过程使其在运行过程中进行参数精细调整时更具优势。本研究为大型加速器设施智能化运行提供了切实可行的方法选择指导。

title: Optimized Arithmetic Architecture in Cryptographic Processor for IoT Embedded System
authors: Sivanandam K, Sugan N, Vijay P, Yasvonth V L
publish: 2026 8th International Conference on Intelligent Sustainable Systems (ICISS)
abstract: The arithmetic architecture of a cryptographic processor with a low-power and high-throughput model with Internet-of-things (IoT) nodes using minimal resources. Resourceconstrained Internet of Things (IoT) devices demand cryptographic solutions that offer strong security with minimal power and hardware overhead. In this work, an optimized arithmetic architecture for a cryptographic processor is presented, targeting low-power IoT embedded systems. The proposed design focuses on improving modular arithmetic operations by replacing conventional adder–multiplexer structures with a LUT-based arithmetic unit optimized for FPGA implementation. This architecture reduces critical path delay, power consumption, and logic utilization while supporting essential cryptographic operations such as modular addition and subtraction. The design is implemented and verified on a Xilinx FPGA using Vivado, where performance is evaluated in terms of power, delay, and power–delay product (PDP). Experimental results demonstrate a significant reduction in power consumption (up to 50%) and improved PDP compared to the existing architecture, validating the suitability of the proposed design for energy-efficient and secure IoT applications.
title_zh: 物联网嵌入式系统中密码处理器的优化算术架构
abstract_zh: 一种面向物联网（IoT）节点的低功耗、高吞吐量加密处理器的算术架构，该架构在资源受限条件下实现最小化资源占用。资源受限的物联网（IoT）设备需要具备强安全性且功耗与硬件开销极低的加密解决方案。本文提出了一种针对低功耗IoT嵌入式系统的优化算术架构，旨在提升加密处理器的性能。所提出的方案通过将传统的加法器-多路选择器结构替换为基于查找表（LUT）的算术单元，以优化FPGA实现效果，从而显著提升模运算操作的效率。该架构有效降低了关键路径延迟、功耗和逻辑资源利用率，同时支持模加法、模减法等关键密码学运算。设计在Xilinx FPGA平台上基于Vivado工具完成实现与验证，性能评估指标包括功耗、延迟以及功耗-延迟积（PDP）。实验结果表明，与现有架构相比，本设计在功耗方面最高降低达50%，且PDP性能显著提升，充分验证了该设计在能源高效与安全的物联网应用中的适用性。

title: ADODroid: A Static Detection Model for Android Malware Based on GCN and BiLSTM
authors: Shuoyuan Zhang, Xinyou Zhang, Zonghai Zhu
publish: 2026 International Conference on Communication Networks and Machine Learning (CNML)
abstract: This article proposes a new Android malware detection model ADODroid. The model extracts three types of software features through static analysis: API call graph, data flow, and opcode sequence. The API call graph provides spatial semantic information of the software, the opcode sequence provides contextual semantic information of the software, and the data flow can enhance the integrity of spatial semantic features. Abstracting the API call graph to enhance the model's anti-obfuscation ability and reduce computational complexity, then embedding the data flow into the graph to enrich the spatial semantics of features, while converting the opcode sequence into embedding vectors. Finally, inject the graph data and embedding vectors into a fusion neural network composed of GCN and BiLSTM, and output the classification results. The experimental results on the AndroZoo and VirusShare datasets show that the detection precision of the trained ADODroid can reach 96%, while having stronger robustness than other similar methods.
title_zh: ADODroid：一种基于GCN和BiLSTM的Android恶意软件静态检测模型
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的安卓恶意软件检测模型ADODroid。该模型通过静态分析提取三类软件特征：API调用图、数据流和操作码序列。其中，API调用图提供软件的空间语义信息，操作码序列提供软件的上下文语义信息，而数据流则能够增强空间语义特征的完整性。通过对API调用图进行抽象化处理，以提升模型的抗混淆能力并降低计算复杂度；随后将数据流嵌入图结构中，丰富特征的空间语义表达；同时将操作码序列转换为嵌入向量。最后，将图数据与嵌入向量输入由图卷积网络（GCN）和双向长短期记忆网络（BiLSTM）组成的融合神经网络，输出分类结果。在AndroZoo和VirusShare数据集上的实验结果表明，训练后的ADODroid检测精度可达96%，且相较于其他类似方法具有更强的鲁棒性。

title: Detecting Test Case Smells Using Prompt Engineering: An Empirical Study in Industry
authors: Lennon Chaves, Flávia Oliveira, Leonardo Tiago
publish: 2025 9th International Conference on Computer, Software and Modeling (ICCSM)
abstract: In the software testing process, test cases are developed to verify whether the software functions as intended. Consequently, test cases must be comprehensible to those who will execute them, and to ensure that they are written comprehensively and accurately, Large Language Models (LLMs) can be employed to assist with this task. With the aim of recommending issues within test cases, this study developed a prompt with 12 smells that should be avoided in test cases to facilitate comprehension. To evaluate the prompt, an empirical study was conducted with 5 participants from a software test team, employing the prompt on test cases from the requirements validation scope of a real industrial scenario. During the study, for each test case, the participants recorded the number of smells recommended by the LLM and subsequently indicated whether they agreed, partially agreed, or disagreed with the response obtained for each test case. Among the results of this experiment, the detection of “Misplaced verification” was observed in 90% of the utilized test cases, while no test case exhibited any “Spell check” smells. Another finding was that approximately 63% of responses from the LLM were classified as “Agree” or “Partially agree” by the participants regarding the smells detected in the test cases, indicating that improvements are necessary for these test cases. Thus, this empirical study presents the results of applying a prompt with 12 test case smells to recommend issues in test cases that validate the requirements of carriers.
title_zh: 使用提示工程检测测试用例异味：一项工业界的实证研究
abstract_zh: 在软件测试过程中，测试用例的开发旨在验证软件是否按预期功能运行。因此，测试用例必须对执行者而言清晰易懂；为确保其编写全面且准确，可借助大型语言模型（LLMs）来辅助完成这一任务。本研究旨在推荐测试用例中存在的问题，为此设计了一个包含12种应避免的“异味”（smells）的提示（prompt），以提升测试用例的可读性与质量。为评估该提示的有效性，研究团队在真实工业场景的需求验证范围内，邀请了来自软件测试团队的5名参与者开展实证研究。实验中，每位参与者针对每个测试用例，记录由LLM识别出的“异味”数量，并对每项检测结果表明其同意、部分同意或不同意。实验结果显示，90%的测试用例中均存在“错误的断言位置”（Misplaced verification）这一异味，而所有测试用例均未发现“拼写检查”（Spell check）类异味。此外，约63%的LLM检测结果被参与者评定为“同意”或“部分同意”，表明当前测试用例仍需进一步改进。综上所述，本实证研究展示了应用包含12种测试用例“异味”的提示，在推荐运营商需求验证测试用例中存在问题方面的有效成果。

title: HyPSI: A Hybrid Protocol Semantic Inference Framework for Industrial Control Systems
authors: Yuxiang Lei, Xuejun Zong, Kan He, Lian Lian, Yifei Sun, Plamen Vasilev, Bowei Ning
abstract: The convergence of Operational Technology (OT) and Information Technology (IT) exposes legacy Industrial Control Systems (ICS) devices to distinct protocol-level attacks due to the lack of semantic filtering mechanisms in modern edge gateways. However, effective security monitoring is hindered by the prevalence of proprietary, undocumented protocol implementations that create a semantic gap. Existing solutions struggle to generalize across vendor-specific implementations due to severe distribution shifts in protocol encoding and the prohibitive cost of manual annotation. To bridge this gap, this paper proposes HyPSI (Hybrid Protocol Semantic Inference), a framework that reformulates semantic inference not merely as a classification task, but as a domain adaptation problem. Operating on a knowledge-guided weakly supervised paradigm, HyPSI utilizes a Knowledge-Guided Semantic Mapper to transform constant-cost expert heuristics into high-confidence pseudo-labels, effectively addressing the initialization challenge with-out large-scale labeled data. Subsequently, to overcome the barrier of protocol heterogeneity, we introduce a Domain-Adaptive Contrastive Learning mechanism. This approach explicitly aligns the representation spaces of diverse protocols, extracting domain-invariant structural features that persist across proprietary variants. Experimental results on a high-fidelity Hardware-in-the-Loop (HIL) testbed demonstrate that HyPSI achieves an average inference accuracy of 88.4%. Crucially, the framework proves its practical utility in downstream security tasks: HyPSI-guided fuzzing significantly improves firmware code coverage compared to blind approaches, validating its effectiveness in automating vulnerability discovery for legacy industrial assets.
title_zh: HyPSI：一种用于工业控制系统的混合协议语义推理框架
abstract_zh: 运营技术（OT）与信息技术（IT）的融合，使传统工业控制系统（ICS）设备暴露于特定协议层的攻击之下，其根本原因在于现代边缘网关缺乏语义过滤机制。然而，由于大量专有且未公开的协议实现普遍存在，导致语义鸿沟显著，严重制约了有效安全监控的实现。现有解决方案在跨厂商协议实现之间难以泛化，主要受限于协议编码上的严重分布偏移，以及人工标注带来的高昂成本。为弥合这一差距，本文提出HyPSI（混合协议语义推断）框架，将语义推断不仅视为分类任务，更重新定义为一个领域自适应问题。该框架基于知识引导的弱监督范式，引入知识引导的语义映射器，将固定成本的专家启发式规则转化为高置信度伪标签，从而在无需大规模标注数据的情况下有效解决初始化难题。为进一步克服协议异构性障碍，我们设计了一种领域自适应对比学习机制，显式对齐不同协议的表示空间，提取在各类专有变体中保持不变的结构特征。在高保真硬件在环（HIL）测试平台上的实验结果表明，HyPSI实现了平均88.4%的推理准确率。尤为重要的是，该框架在下游安全任务中展现出实际应用价值：基于HyPSI指导的模糊测试方法相比盲测策略，显著提升了固件代码覆盖率，验证了其在自动化发现老旧工业资产漏洞方面的有效性。
